---
title: "CviMVP_oyster_GO_plotting"
author: "Camille Rumberger"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(ggplot2) # for plotting
library(raster) # for environmental pixels
library(sf) # plotting
library(rnaturalearth) # plotting
library(maps) # mapping
library(ggspatial) # mapping
library(ggrepel) # mapping
```

# Genomic Offset Plotting

This script is for high quality plotting and export of genomic offset predictions across all methods (LEA, GF, RDA, EnvDist) to an editable powerpoint with vectorized graphics.

## Genomic Offset Objects

```{r}

```

## Plots


## Export
